3125740.name: StoryMaker
3125740.description:
StoryMaker, an all-in-one program, helps you plan and create complex works, including planning, storytelling, character settings, storyboards, timelines, and worldviews.

  • Enhance the completeness of your planning.
  • Create diverse and three-dimensional characters.
  • Easily link and modify characters, storyboards, and narrative arcs.
  • Generate and store ideas using mind maps and notes.
  • View your workload through statistics.
